title: VETERAN SERVICES - 211info
text: MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE VETERAN SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with processing educational benefits, creating an academic plan, and connecting to community resources and services. 26000 SE Stark Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Veterans, active duty, Reserves, National Guard, and veteran dependents and/or survivors Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 491-7346 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 491-7346 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: No documents required, however it is helpful to bring in DD214 and a copy of college transcripts if applicable AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Student Financial Aid * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - MHCC DENTAL HYGIENE CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE
